programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: A tycoon and a lawyer can't get along until they find they can't live without each other.

programme.title: Movie: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: In high school, Bob Stone was a bullied geek and Calvin was popular. Years later, Bob returns as a lethal CIA agent that needs Calvin, who's now an accountant, to help solve a major case. The two enter a world of espionage that could get them killed.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Vacation
programme.desc: A grown-up Rusty Griswold takes his family on a surprise trip of a lifetime to Walley World in order to spice up his relationship with his wife and reconnect with his two sons.

programme.title: Movie: How to Be Single
programme.desc: There's a right way to be single, a wrong way to be single and then there's Alice.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: More Now
programme.desc: Pride is adamant the elusive 'Baitfish' has returned and, in an attempt to locate his nemesis, he has the team investigate crime scenes and chase leads from New Orleans to Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The List
programme.desc: After a sailor is murdered in the champagne room of a strip club, the team links the murder weapon to two additional unsolved cases. Also, Brody's ex-fiancé pays her a surprise visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Stolen Valor
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a retired SEAL who tracked down individuals impersonating military personnel. But the case takes a mysterious turn when the lead suspect is found with the Navy issued jacket of an officer killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Genetically re-created dinosaurs break out of captivity and wreak havoc in a theme park.

programme.title: Movie: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Dr. Ian Malcolm follows his girlfriend to an island inhabited by dinosaurs to study them in their natural habitat. Disaster strikes and the group find themselves in the ultimate fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A wealthy couple's son goes missing on a remote island full of dinosaurs. The couple tricks a paleontologist into going back and helping them find their son, but things don't go according to plan.

programme.title: Movie: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
programme.desc: Luke seeks out a Jedi master while his friends are relentlessly pursued by Darth Vader.

programme.title: Movie: The Green Mile

programme.title: Movie: The Intern
programme.desc: A 70-year-old widower, bored with retirement, takes an internship at a successful Brooklyn startup, where he soon proves his worth to his young boss.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Movie: Anaconda
programme.desc: A snake expert dupes a film team into helping him search for a 40-foot long snake.

programme.title: Movie: Anaconda

Breaking Bad: Thirty-Eight Snub

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Bullet Points

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Shotgun

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Grumpy Young Men
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get into a fight over a girl, but in the end their friendship prevails.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Misery
programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing

programme.title: Martin: Whoop There It Ain't
programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.desc: Shawn dreams of success when he's hired at an ad agency, but his boss promptly steals his first slogan.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: I Do?
programme.desc: Marlon proposes to his girlfriend when her threatening brother suggests this would be a good idea.

programme.desc: Marlon gets a part in a national musical, ruining Shawn's plans to expand the 'Williams Brothers News.'

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A Hong Kong police inspector is paired with an L.A. detective to investigate a kidnapping.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Us
programme.desc: The owner of a Romance bookstore runs into her first love, an architect who is overseeing a development that will forever change her neighbourhood. Her nostalgia for her home clashes with his desire for change, but their romantic tension may unite them.

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts

programme.title: Movie: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order

programme.title: Movie: My One and Only

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Romance and Chocolate

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Girls Are Missing
programme.desc: In the winter of 1974, college-age women from the Pacific Northwest began to disappear seemingly without a trace.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: Ted Escapes
programme.desc: While serving time for aggravated kidnapping in Utah and facing first degree murder charges in Colorado, Ted Bundy escaped not once, but twice from authorities.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Murder Trials
programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Death Row Confessions
programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Glass Maker
programme.desc: Mike goes to Jonesboro, Arkansas to perform some research using Dung Beetles, then he heads to Williamstown, West Virginia to try his hand at making some glass art.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reindeer Farm
programme.desc: Mike heads to Kentucky to try shrink wrapping a houseboat, and then he heads off to Alaska to spend the day at a reindeer farm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: High-Rise Window Washer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Hawaii to join the crew of the Worldwide Window Cleaning to help them clean some windows 40 storeys above Honolulu.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Dozer Dave's Comeback
programme.desc: Former Gold Rush miner Dave Turin is back and he's prospecting for an abandoned mine he can reopen. And even when his investor backs out, Dave's prepared to bet it all, including his family's savings, on his ability to strike it rich.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Amateur Antics
programme.desc: Dave Turin continues his big comeback by assembling a team of amateur miners to take on a patch of untested ground in Arizona. Faulty equipment and rookie mistakes stack the odds against him, leading Dave to wonder if he's already lost on his investment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Dirt-Digging Detective
programme.desc: Dozer Dave experiences a real-life nightmare when the ground he's been mining goes cold. An investigation to find out where the problem lies is launched, leading Dave to find virgin ground that may be his ticket to big money.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Disaster Strikes
programme.desc: Dave's crew is looking good to reach their 100-ounce goal when disaster strikes in the form of an equipment malfunction merely days before their deadline. Dave takes a bold risk that can either shut him down or put him back in business for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Going for the Gold
programme.desc: As he prepares for a new season, Dave gathers his team to go over his mining strategy and lessons learned. Revealing their new prospecting location, he makes the crew a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Amateur Antics
programme.desc: Dave Turin continues his big comeback by assembling a team of amateur miners to take on a patch of untested ground in Arizona. Faulty equipment and rookie mistakes stack the odds against him, leading Dave to wonder if he's already lost on his investment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Dirt-Digging Detective
programme.desc: Dozer Dave experiences a real-life nightmare when the ground he's been mining goes cold. An investigation to find out where the problem lies is launched, leading Dave to find virgin ground that may be his ticket to big money.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Going for the Gold
programme.desc: As he prepares for a new season, Dave gathers his team to go over his mining strategy and lessons learned. Revealing their new prospecting location, he makes the crew a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Most Extreme Adventures
programme.desc: Josh and crew share ten extreme adventures from filming Expedition Unknown.

programme.title: Tougher Than It Looks: Rescue Work
programme.desc: Andrew sets out to see how tough it is to be a rescue worker. He will first attempt to rescue a dummy from a mangled car using the Jaws of Life, before it explodes in flames. Then he will use a water cannon attached to a Crash Truck.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: The bass bite like crazy as Jimmy and Joe Hall fish in front of a storm.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Peacock Bass on the Amazon
programme.desc: We fish for peacock bass on the Amazon River.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Special Forces Green Beret - Greg Stube
programme.desc: Greg Stube was wounded during Operation Medusa in Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: A Little Help from My Friends
programme.desc: Lain and George fish in the Everglades with radio host Matt Bellinger, and learn about Dolphin's Plus Marine Mammal Rescue.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Cape Eleuthera, Bahamas - Long Range Dolphin!
programme.desc: George and Harry Vernon III take the MARC VI from North Miami Dade's Haulover Inlet to the Cape Eleuthera Resort and Marina.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Fish Gods
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old fly angler, Stevie Kim, joins Jared in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Redfish Restock
programme.desc: CCA Florida's Brian Gorsk joins Rick to tour Duke Energy's redfish restocking center in Crystal River, and teach future generations of anglers about fishing and conservation.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Luke, a go-getter from Southern California, and Alyssa, a positive survival instructor, take on the rugged coast of the Yucatan. They sruggle to survive dehydration, hunger, and the threat of caiman.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Mom Is Pulling Strings up There!
programme.desc: Randy heads to the desert to give Lindsey an unforgettable Mothers' Day surprise. Also, Jazmin's shopping with her trio of protective brothers and Lyndzie's afraid her dress won't fit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Evil Mom Here
programme.desc: Samantha's already shopped at 100 different bridal stores without ever finding the right dress and her bullying mom is not helping. Last Minute Lia, on the other hand, has never tried a single gown and has to leave with one today.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ... and Some Sweating for the Wedding
programme.desc: Four gym pals from Pennsylvania judge each other's weddings for the chance to win a honeymoon. Each one has a personal journey to 'I do,' as they try to claim the prize and navigate twists and turns as never seen before.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mother May I?
programme.desc: Jibrell wants to look like a princess on her big day, but her unfiltered Mom may turn Jibrells fairytale dress dreams into a nightmare. Kassie struggles to find a gown without her late mother. Also, Bianca hopes to impress her parents with her dress pick.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Room for the Groom
programme.desc: With just weeks left until her big day, Lisa has brought her opinionated fiancé to the store for dress backup. Later, bride Christina's long-distance engagement has left her friends and family wary.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Betting Against the Barn
programme.desc: Chasity wants a fabulous dress for her Vegas themed wedding, but her fashionista brother has other ideas. Bride Sarah's mom deems her daughter's dress vision too fancy for her barn wedding. Gail hopes her dieting won't affect her final dress fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Dress Against All Odds
programme.desc: After an accident, Katie is determined to walk down the aisle in her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Do ... Does Dad?
programme.desc: Lindsay is torn between pleasing her dad and her fiancé, YouTube star Phil DeFranco. Jennifer wants a simple gown for her big day, but her fashionista dad has other ideas. At her fitting, Sarah hopes for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: When the Leading Man Takes a Stand
programme.desc: To bride Kiara, the only opinion that matters is her grandfather's. But when Kiara falls for a dress over budget, she risks leaving the salon empty handed. Strength competitor Talia struggles to find a dress that pleases both her vision and her fiancé's.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Wedding Gown Bro Down
programme.desc: Bride Taylor is all about glitz and glam, so naturally she wants her wedding dress to be a show-stopper. But with her NFL star brother Maurice Jones Drew paying for the dress, will her over the top dress dreams come true?

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: What Would Phaedra Do?
programme.desc: Bride Nikki gets a big surprise when her favourite celebrity idol shows up to help her choose the wedding gown of her dreams. Meanwhile, bride Melody is ready to see her custom jet-black gown, but her mom may not approve of this non-traditional choice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Two Montes are Better Than None
programme.desc: Bride Katherine wants a vintage dress she can wear with cowboy boots, but her BFF is pushing for a glamorous Parisian-inspired gown. Bride Dawn's son is a mini-fashionista who gives Monte a run for his money as he seeks out the perfect dress for his mom.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: 88 and Out at the Gate
programme.desc: Lori and Monte head to Nashville to help country artist Jimmy Stanley with a surprise proposal to fellow country singer Kristen Kelley. She also gets another surprise from Lori and Monte that she never sees coming.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Sparkle Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: YouTube sensation and bride BFFTaylor won't feel satisfied with her dress until her mom cries. Olympian bride Kellie Wells comes in tow with Team Conservative and Team Sexy, and she must please them both or risk leaving empty-handed.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options
programme.desc: Bride Katy brought along her stylish Aunt Kristin to shop. Bride Genine falls in love with a dress but her sort-of-psychic friend isn't sure. Meanwhile Monte helps bride Gretchen tailor her dress to perfection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Multiple Dress Personality Disorder
programme.desc: WNBA star and bride Angel has a game plan to say yes to a pantsuit, but her friend thinks she should sport a dress. Bride Angel's fiancée, Brande, isn't sure about the kind of dress she wants. Meanwhile, bride Cassie is on the hunt for the perfect veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: If I Feel Like a Penny, I Need to Look Like a Million
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer is a breast cancer survivor who wants to show off her curves, but Mom prefers her mounds to be covered. Bride Jasmine's mom has always questioned her style, but Lori suspects that's not the only reason she's doubting this bride's vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Lonely in Flagstaff
programme.desc: Meri returns to Flagstaff but still feels alone. When she meets the other Sister Wives for lunch, old tensions bubble to the surface. Meanwhile Kody has a plan to reunite the family.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Four Wives, One House?
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Kody finally presents to his family his pitch for all four wives to live in one big house. Janelle actually likes the idea, but Christine is dead set against it. Merry Christmas!

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling salute the troops with some 'Basic, Basic Training,' take to the sky with 'Flyin' and Winnin',' and get extra patriotic with 'For Country.'

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Marble Monument to Love

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Best Castle n Orange County

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Who R Zoo?/ Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles. SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mind the Gap/ Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob has a change in demeanor after Squidward closes the gap in his teeth.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Escape Room
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain get trapped inside an escape room with two new kids who are strangely good and solving the puzzles.

programme.title: All That

programme.title: The Substitute: Asher Angel
programme.desc: Musician and movie star Asher Angel goes undercover as The Substitute. Asher is disguised as a snooty former child genius, an obnoxious world record holder, and an overeager competitive eater.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Vows
programme.desc: With only four weeks left before the wedding, Chandler is still struggling with his vows.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Chandler's Dad
programme.desc: Monica arranges a face-to-face meeting between Chandler and his estranged father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Monica and Chandler's Wedding
programme.desc: Chandler goes missing when he experiences 'cold feet' on the eve of his and Monica's wedding.

programme.title: Friends: The One After 'I Do'

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Red Sweater
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe speculate about who might be the father of Rachel's baby.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Tells...

programme.title: Mom: Mozzarella Sticks and a Gay Piano Bar
programme.desc: After Christy and Bonnie get Jodi, a recovering drug addict, back on her feet, they find themselves addicted to the rush of helping others and take on a new 'project' Michelle.

programme.title: Mom: Sawdust and Brisket
programme.desc: Christy is thrilled when Violet tells her she wants to spend more time together and improve their relationship. Also, Bonnie tries to make amends with her nemesis in the building, Beverly.

programme.title: Mom: A Pirate, Three Frogs and a Prince
programme.desc: Roscoe's parent-teacher conference leaves Christy feeling threatened by Baxter's girlfriend, Candace. Also, Bonnie tries to get her dating mojo back by flirting with an unlikely target.

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
programme.desc: Christy hosts a family dinner for Violet's hard-to-please future mother-in-law. Also, Bonnie balks when Steve wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: George Lopez: The Unnatural

programme.title: George Lopez: No Free Launch

programme.title: George Lopez: The Wedding Dance
programme.desc: George gets more than he bargained for when he asks Angie to dance at a wedding.

programme.title: George Lopez: Love Bites
programme.desc: With Carmen growing up, George and Angie teach her the birds and the bees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: Spongebob is jellyfishing when he realizes that he wants to fly with the jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Real Steel

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutty Nieces/ Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's three nieces. SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Cabin in the Kelp/ The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals spend the weekend in a cabin in the woods.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton clones himself and Mr. Krabs, and Squidward switches jobs with a school bus driver, but SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Tornado: Henryville

programme.title: Mayday: Racing the Storm
programme.desc: At the height of the thunderstorm season in Arkansas, Flight 1420 ends in disaster.

programme.title: Mayday: Pilot Betrayed
programme.desc: Scandinavian Airlines Flight 751 takes off in winter conditions from Stockholm and within seconds, both engines fail. Investigators must determine what brought down a nearly new, state-of-the-art jetliner.

programme.title: Mayday: Missing Over New York
programme.desc: In 1990, a Columbian flight hit a massive storm on its way to New York, forcing the plane to remain in a holding pattern above the city. Finally running out of fuel, the plane crashes into a wealthy suburb, resulting in controversial conclusions.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dee/ Jan
programme.desc: Dee blew a $150,000 legal settlement to fulfill her hoarding obsession. Jan admits she's been living in filth for years. She hasn't taken the trash out since 2006 and goes months without showering.

programme.title: Hoarders: Verna/ Joanne
programme.desc: When Verna is hospitalized, the hospital refuses to let her return home unless it's cleaned up. Joanne's house has gone from immaculate showplace to garbage pit.

programme.title: Hoarders: Doug/ Ruth
programme.desc: Doug, who suffered severe brain trauma and memory loss in an accident, hoards items he feels might trigger his memories. Ruth has turned her beautiful home into a shrine for the three members of her family who died there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Charles and Alvin
programme.desc: Charles' house is filled with thousands of paintings he has done and his family worries he may hurt himself. Alvin's hoarding is so out of control that he's been forced to put his TV and food cooler in his bathroom and spend his time there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lloyd/ Carol
programme.desc: Lloyd faces $150,000 in fines if he doesn't clean up his property; Carol's husband will leave her for good if she doesn't clean up her act.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Kind of Like a Seafoam Green
programme.desc: Michael shows shoppers how to manipulate solid objects and reveals how vacuums work. Plus, one man's day becomes very colorful and confusing.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Super Saturn Moon Travel
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael's got exploding fruit, levitation sparklers and a discovery in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule totally blows one man's mind.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Juicy
programme.desc: Ron G, Steven Briggs, Correy Bell and Neko White perform.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Worst Laid Plans
programme.desc: Rachel Feinstein, Tony Baker and Nate Jackson perform.

programme.desc: Joyelle is done with dating actors, Daniel Weingarten accepts a challenge from his parents, and Yamaneika explains just how hard it is to run these streets. Plus, Rachel Feinstein's mom has soul in the 'joke of the night.'

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Cat Calling
programme.desc: Brandon 'Hot Sauce' Glover shows us just how petty he can be in relationships, find out why.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: House of Horrors

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Living Trilobite

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Look Out Below
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight’s big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q strike the wrong chord as music instructors and try to save face in a humiliating focus group face-off. Plus, tonight’s big loser lacks the magic touch in a show-stopping punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Field of Screams
programme.desc: The guys must identify the joker behind the humiliating commands in a voice-disguising challenge. Then, they call it quits with a cringe-worthy public announcement, and act as dinosaur experts with preposterous prehistoric lessons.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bonus Footage
programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: E!'s Brunch at the Oscars
programme.desc: E! hosts and special guests provide viewers with the ultimate guide to the 2020 Oscars.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: Going Down With the Ship
programme.desc: Robert Irvine returns to Sunrise, Florida, to check on the unique challenge of Gigi's Music Cafe, a combined restaurant and music venue. The owner couldn't see the burden she was placing on her daughter who managed the business.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Out with the Old, In with the New
programme.desc: At Carmine's Chianti Cow in Port Jervis, N.Y., Chef Robert Irvine meets an owner whose identity crisis is threatening his restaurant. Stuck in a rut serving the same food as the previous owner, Chef Keith needs a wake-up call.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Meat Lovers
programme.desc: It's meat any way you like it when Guy Fieri heads to Miami to see what his buddy is doing with chicken and duck. A noodle shop in Portland, Ore., is churning out thousands of dumplings a week these days.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin' In Beantown
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is in Beantown for an all-Boston smorgasbord. Just outside the city in Allston, two restaurants share an open kitchen but have completely different menus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: It's all about the beef on this trip as Guy Fieri pops into a classic diner in Marietta, Georgia, for a taste of what's topping the charts these days. Next, it's on to San Antonio where a carwash-laundromat-kitchen combo is crankin' out killer burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coming Together In Cali
programme.desc: For this trip, Guy Fieri zeroes in on Chico, California, celebrating the town's food scene as residents and restaurant owners recover from ravaging fires that rocked the area.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tipsy Desserts
programme.desc: Dessert is good, but for Ina Garten, tipsy desserts are even better. She uses sparkling white wine to add a little zing to moscato poached fruit that can be made in advance.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cocoa-Licious Brunch
programme.desc: Chocolate lovers will delight in Bobby Flay's ultimate cocoa-filled brunch! He's serving up decadent dishes like chocolate-drizzled scones, stuffed Mexican hot chocolate French toast with cinnamon whipped cream, and a chocolate peanut butter smoothies.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Chocolate Lover's Supper
programme.desc: To show that chocolate can be more than just candy bars and desserts, Guy Fieri invites some of his favorite chefs to reveal how versatile cocoa can be. Aarti Sequeira makes whipped goat cheese with cacao nibs, thyme, black pepper and honey on crostini.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Gal-Entine's Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is showing her love and appreciation for her best girlfriends with a treat-filled luncheon a few days before Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Speedy Sweets
programme.desc: Ree's sharing four delicious done-in-a-flash desserts, from a great White Chocolate Pudding that's a huge family favorite, to a fast and fabulous Raspberry Fool that's light, creamy and perfect for company.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chocolate Day
programme.desc: Ree has challenged herself to shake up three great knock-it-out-of-the-park easy but impressive chocolate recipes for the blog.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet School Treats
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes divine chocolate treats for her daughter, including classic chocolate cups with homemade sugared orange.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Shades Of Chocolate
programme.desc: The most decadent chocolate treats from white chocolate all the way down to dark! There's white chocolate raspberry cheesecake, dipped and decorated waffle cones, milk chocolate mousse and, to top it all off, a chocolate orange.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Date Night
programme.desc: It's date night on the farm! Molly Yeh makes a romantic dinner for husband Nick, including juicy steak salad with a bright za'atar chimichurri, the best cheesy garlic babka muffins and blood orange amaretto sours.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Heart-y Valentine's Day
programme.desc: To celebrate Valentine's Day, Valerie Bertinelli has put together a heart-y meal with a hidden motive: providing her dearest friends with heart-healthy sweets and treats.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double Date Dinner
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Kardea and her boyfriend Nassir have a double date dinner with their friends, Yolanda and Eugene. Kardea kicks off the night with a savory peppered skirt steak salad with crumbled blue.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Chocolate for Breakfast
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis invites friends over for a Valentine's Day-themed breakfast with chocolate in every dish. She treats them to a playful, laid-back morning with beanbag chairs, games and an indulgent, buffet-style breakfast menu.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Opposites Attract
programme.desc: Love is in the air for a Valentine's Day filled with out-of-the-box flavour combinations and opposites-attract recipes. Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro share their take on surf and turf.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Let's Get Ready to Tailgate
programme.desc: It's game day, and the teams of recruits face off as they make game day dishes in order to move down the field to the end zone. Then they re-create burgers made by Alton Brown and Anne Burrell.

programme.title: Chopped: Chocolate Rush!
programme.desc: A surge of excitement is felt in the 'Chopped' Kitchen when the chefs find out that every mystery basket will contain chocolate! In the first round, the chefs must figure out how to make chocolate ingredients work with pork chops.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pest

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Wish
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin believe they’ve turned Miss Simian into a neck-cushion.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Hug

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The BFFs
programme.desc: When Gumball’s old BFF turns up, Darwin gets jealous.

programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin’s clothes go missing after a swimming lesson, and Gumball is forced to wear a tuxedo from the lost and found office. He believes it makes him look like a certain dapper British secret agent.

programme.desc: Apple needs to acquire a lifetime supply of toilet paper to finish his modern art sculpture.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Not Funny

programme.desc: The work study students become involved in some big fights when they go with their respective heroes.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: An Unpleasant Talk
programme.desc: The work study students from U.A. attend a meeting of heroes gathered by Sir Nighteye and leave with new resolve.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: God Rest Ye Merry Gentle-Mannequins
programme.desc: Bob inherits a storage unit, and the whole family imagines treasures, but only finds a man named Chet living inside.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Mother Daughter Laser Razor
programme.desc: Linda frets that Louise doesn't like her and, to Louise's chagrin, forces her to attend a Mother-Daughter seminar to beef up their relationship.

programme.title: Family Guy: Peter's Def Jam
programme.desc: The guys try to start a podcast, but Peter goes solo and branches out as a DJ. Meanwhile, back at the Griffin home, Lois' allergy forces Brian to move into Stewie's bedroom and the two have roommate difficulties.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Unforseen Hope
programme.desc: The three heroes finally reach the area where the others are and find one of their friends past his limit.

programme.title: Dr. Stone: The Treasure
programme.desc: Venturing into a cave in search of their friend, there's a suspicious accident that leaves two of their party trapped at the bottom of a pit.

programme.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba: Mount Natagumo

programme.title: Food Wars! Shokugeki no Soma: The Pursuer

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: Mirror Man and Purple Smoke

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr. Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Revolt
programme.desc: Darwin feels bad for the household objects in Elmore and encourages them to rise up.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Routine
programme.desc: Dad spends the day alone and the secrets of his daily routine are revealed.

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Mao Mao's Bike Adventure
programme.desc: When Mao Mao underestimates enemy and friend alike, it almost costs him the entire kingdom.

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Breakup
programme.desc: Feeling left out, Adorabat wishes Mao Mao and Badgerclops would spend less time with each other and more time with her. When she gets what she wishes for and accidentally breaks up their friendship.

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Not Impressed
programme.desc: When a Sweetypie isn’t impressed with the sheriff dept.’s antics, our three heroes try everything to win him over.

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Enemy Mime
programme.desc: When the Sheriff’s Dept. fights a monster that copies their every move, they’ll have to find a way to fight without fighting.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Super Robin/ Tower Power
programme.desc: Robin convinces Raven to use her magic to give him powers; The team disassembles Cyborg when he shorts out and they forgot how to reassemble him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Lication
programme.desc: Robin teaches the other Titans about a moneymaking application but they have their doubts about this 'shareconomy.'

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Classic Titans
programme.desc: To prove his point about classic superhero cartoons, Control Freak sends the Titans to a former version of Teen Titans Go!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Movie Night
programme.desc: It’s Movie Night, and the Titans have a hard time deciding who gets to choose which movie they watch.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Labor day
programme.desc: It's Labor Day and Robin teaches the other Titans about the importance of labor.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Permanent Record
programme.desc: The Titans head back to school and educate one other about science and grammar.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Ones and Zeros
programme.desc: The Titans build an AI robot so it will create a pizza that's never been made before.

programme.title: Ben 10: Summer Breakers
programme.desc: After Grandpa Max's super smart buddy Phil discovers that a second extraterrestrial item crashed alongside the Omnitrix, Team Tennyson sets off to find the second crash site before someone else does.

programme.title: Ben 10: The Monsters in Your Head
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen learn a rumour of an alien invasion happening at the park they are camping at, but when they investigate, they discover a preserve containing a host of mutated creatures engineered by Animo.

programme.title: Power Players: Knockout
programme.desc: Axel and the team juggle not waking Uncle Andrew from his nap and stopping Orangutank from stealing Andrew's latest invention: the knockout box.

programme.title: Power Players: Sarge in Charge
programme.desc: While out in Axel’s garden checking on his security system, Sarge Charge disappears.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star
programme.desc: A comedic look at the superheroes’ lives. Viewers will finally get the opportunity to watch what life is like for the super teens when their capes are left at home.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sidekick
programme.desc: During a quest to retrieve a loaned video game, Darwin begins to suspect that he is trapped playing second-fiddle to Gumball.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Web
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin give Nicole a crash course in computers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Traitor
programme.desc: When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun, Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Upgrade
programme.desc: Bobert is encouraged to update his computer's operating system by Gumball and Darwin, but things don't go so well.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Advice
programme.desc: Mr. Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball is the star of his own comic, but struggles to match up to his heroic alter-ego.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signal
programme.desc: Gumball develops a strange stutter, and it makes him accidentally offend Darwin.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Simons are Forever
programme.desc: Duncan and Leshawna try to take advantage of Izzy’s love for the game of Simon Says.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Mother of All Cards
programme.desc: Chef attempts to trick the kids into making his mother gifts after he forgets about Mother’s Day.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Soother or Later
programme.desc: Duncan finally manages to break out only to realize he’s forgotten his pacifier and needs to break back into the school to get it.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Mutt Ado About Owen
programme.desc: After accidentally hypnotizing Owen into being a dog, Harold thinks he must reverse the hypnosis to avoid going to jail.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Demon Prom
programme.desc: When Trigon forces Raven to go to prom, she asks the other Titans to join her in order to frustrate him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBCYFSHIPBDAY
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg celebrate the birthday of their friendship.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mo' Money Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Beast Boy convinces Robin to give the titans a tour of Wayne Manor. The others believe that money must solve all problems, but Robin thinks it's a vice.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Girl
programme.desc: As the Titans deal with Madame Rouge, Beast Boy is excited to meet his female counterpart Beast Girl.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 3
programme.desc: Batman would rather watch TV then go to his own birthday party. Beast Boy and Cyborg act as Knight Rider.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Bro-pocalypse
programme.desc: When the male Titans are injured, Raven and Starfire must become bros to stop the Bropocalypse.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Scoop
programme.desc: Starfire befriends an ice cream scoop and steals it from the HIVE's ice cream social. The rest of the titans show concern over her love of inanimate objects.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Chicken in the Cradle
programme.desc: Beast Boy lays an egg, but instead of taking care of his newly-hatched chick he goofs off and lets the others deal with it.

programme.title: Roseanne: Morning Becomes Obnoxious
programme.desc: During a man-on-the-street interview on 'Wake Up, Chicago', Roseanne speaks her mind. The producers love her opinionated blue collar outlook so much; they invite her to Chicago to be a guest commentator on the show.

programme.title: Roseanne: Ballroom Blitz
programme.desc: Jackie goes on a date with Bev's ballroom instructor - sending her mother into a jealous tizzy. Roseanne uses Darlene's wedding as a means to get free stuff.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher joins the cast as Walden Schmidt, an Internet billionaire with a broken heart.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Advantage: Fat, Flying Baby
programme.desc: Walden, depressed about being single on Valentine's Day, tries to convince Kate to give him another chance. Meanwhile, Alan's Valentine's Day plans take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sips, Sonnets and Sodomy
programme.desc: Strained relationships and a girl-fight result when a huge storm traps Walden, Alan, Zoey and Lyndsey in the house on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Is Not Gonna End Well
programme.desc: Jake becomes Charlie's designated driver after he has his license suspended and to Charlie's chagrin, Alan makes plans to attend Chelsea's birthday party.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Girls and a Guy Named Bud
programme.desc: When Jake learns that Alan is dating Eldridge's mom, he packs his things to stay with Judith and Herb.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bottle of Wine and a Jackhammer
programme.desc: When Lindsey asks Alan to move in with her, Charlie will do anything to get Alan to say 'yes.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pudding-Filled Cactus
programme.desc: Alan moves in with Lyndsey but continues to have a rendezvous with Melissa at Charlie's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hookers, Hookers, Hookers
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after Alan burns down their home.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Immortal Mr. Billy Joel
programme.desc: Alan goes out on the town, pretending to be Charlie, while Charlie sneaks off for some cosmetic surgery.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grandma's Pie
programme.desc: Walden breaks the news to Zoey that he is going into business with his ex-wife. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey try to come to terms with their moms' new relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Crazy Bitch Gazette
programme.desc: Charlie's past comes back to bite him when his girlfriend decides that his stalker, Rose, is just too much to handle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Springtime on a Stick
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan try to set Evelyn up with Russell, the pharmacist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Good Time in Central Africa
programme.desc: When Berta takes a couple of days off, Charlie falls for her replacement. Meanwhile, Alan believes he's being stalked by Lyndsey's ex-husband.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ow, Ow, Don't Stop
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for his old fling, Courtney, who shows up after three years in prison for conning him out of money.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dead From the Waist Down
programme.desc: Alan gets creative when he discovers that he can't afford to buy Lyndsey a nice birthday present.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Chocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's Dead
programme.desc: Charlie falls into a depression after his break-up with Courtney and goes to see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Skunk, Dog Crap and Ketchup
programme.desc: When Charlie and Lyndsey start becoming friendly, Alan's paranoia gets the best of him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lookin' for Japanese Subs
programme.desc: Charlie's obsession with the newly 'married' Rose leads him to stalk her. Meanwhile, Alan grows concerned when Jake and Eldridge start videotaping stupid and extremely dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Darn Priest
programme.desc: Rose uncovers Alan's Ponzi scheme and Alan, in turn, meets 'Manny,' Rose's mannequin 'husband.'

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Other F Word
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to promote racial and ethnic diversity at Ritchie's exclusive private school has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Long Day Journey Into Stan
programme.desc: Following Christine's break-up with Burton, everyone expects her to fall apart emotionally but she insists she is fine and looking forward to spending time alone. But after being humiliated in a restaurant she realizes that she really did care for him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Teach Your Children Well
programme.desc: Christine feels pressured to throw an extravagant party for Ritchie's birthday, his first involving kids from his new school. Recoiling from sticker shock after meeting with an event planner, Christine decides to have an arts and crafts party at home.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: Christine tries not to have a meltdown when her ex-husband, Richard, brings his 'new' Christine with him to pick up Ritchie and take him to breakfast so that they can get to know one another.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce
programme.desc: Christine's former marriage counsellor comes into the gym, leading to some awkwardness between the women. When Christine mentions this to Richard, his cryptic reaction leads her to wonder if it was in the counsellor's interest to encourage their divorce.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche accompany Rose to her aunt's funeral where she must give the eulogy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev
programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mixed Blessing
programme.desc: Dorothy's son, Michael, pays another visit and this time he has an announcement: he's engaged. However, Dorothy has two more surprises in store.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Looking for a Home: The Villalobos Bowl
programme.desc: Before heading to New York City's Dog Bowl, Mariah and M2 prepare their most eligible rescues for the big day. Toney and Earl discover an emancipated stray dog roaming a nearby neighbourhood. A lone trucker comes to VRC to find a forever friend.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow animal expert and adventurer Coyote Peterson around the world as he gets up-close to the most fascinating creatures. He uncovers the secrets of animals we often misunderstand. Every animal has a story to tell and Coyote braves the wild to tell it.

programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.desc: The docs head to the Renaissance Faire to tend to the birds of prey in need of the West Nile vaccine. Piper the peppy dachshund is not herself and Dr. Lavigne must perform surgery. Meanwhile, Dr. Ross treats Tesla the tortoise for a fractured beak.
