programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Best Bites: Black Sea Hare
programme.desc: Follow an animal expert as he gets up close to the most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Best Bites: Wolverine
programme.desc: Follow an animal expert as he gets up close to the most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Best Bites: Galapagos Tortoise
programme.desc: Follow an animal expert as he gets up close to the most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Best Bites: Poison Frog
programme.desc: Follow an animal expert as he gets up close to the most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Best Bites: Bloodworm
programme.desc: Follow an animal expert as he gets up close to the most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.desc: Nikki and Kim elect themselves the new supers of their building in exchange for free rent.

programme.title: The Parkers: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: While trying to create her own beauty line, Nikki winds up cooking herself a new career.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Knockout Times Two
programme.desc: Nikki stages a boxing match with a magazine editor who is after Professor Oglevee.

programme.desc: A poor mechanic falls in love with his successful attorney while he fights for custody of his three daughters to protect them from an abusive mother. He must now protect his children and not let the love of his life slip away.

programme.title: Movie: Megachurch Murder
programme.desc: After a charismatic megachurch leader commits suicide, his teenage daughter finds evidence pointing towards a conspiracy and threats. As she gets closer to the truth, she realizes her mother and her boyfriend's father may be involved.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself

programme.title: House of Payne: Payneful Assistance
programme.desc: Miranda gets cooking advice after she makes a horrible dinner for Ella's club. Meanwhile, Curtis gets his tonsils pulled and can't talk.

programme.title: House of Payne: Brain Payne

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours
programme.desc: The team believes they've finally narrowed down where Bigfoot has been hiding throughout their expedition. A high-tech drone is brought in to investigate, and what takes place next is truly astonishing.

programme.title: Loch Ness Monster: New Evidence
programme.desc: Professor Neil Gemmell uses cutting-edge DNA science to unravel the mystery of the Loch Ness monster. He puts the leading theories to the ultimate scientific test and launches a stunning new chapter in the hunt for Nessie.

programme.title: Redrum: Crying Uncle
programme.desc: When Charlie Brandt and his wife Teri take shelter at their niece Michelle Jones' home due to a hurricane, all three end up dead. Investigators are stuck as to why this could have happened until a family secret dating back 33 years surfaces.

programme.title: Redrum: Blue Blood
programme.desc: Victoria Cushman is a hardworking woman in the New England area. There doesn't seem to be a person alive who would say a bad word about her. So, her community is shocked when her dead body is discovered in her apartment. Who would hurt such a sweet woman?

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Poser
programme.desc: Ex-Marine Raymond 'R.J.' McLeod seems like a knight in shining armor to one single mom, but as John Walsh reveals, she was far from safe. Then, Callahan Walsh discovers how rapper Maurice Nesbitt's constant abuse of his girlfriend eventually turns deadly.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Burning Love

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Selena

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Monster

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: To Die for
programme.desc: Explores the case of the high school teacher whose teenage student and lover killed her husband.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer

programme.title: Shattered: The Darkside

programme.title: Shattered: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: 1993. Rockville, MD. A woman is shocked to discover her sister and nephew killed in cold blood... unwittingly, a daughter becomes a pawn in a dark and brutal murder plot... and a prosecutor makes it his personal mission to bring a killer to justice.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer

programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique, tree-themed yurt. The Beschens decide on a large, 30-foot yurt and request other yurt firsts such as a private, walled-off master bedroom and the largest dormer they've ever built.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Keeping Morale Up
programme.desc: A new season of builders brave the Alaskan elements to construct off-the-grid cabins. Jeff Erickson takes on a challenging cliffside build, Chappie Cook's team struggles to get materials to the site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Progress Is Messy
programme.desc: A SkyCrane helicopter delivers a whopping 17,000 pounds of materials for Chris Sewell's cabin kit, Jeff Erickson fights the pouring rain and cold temperatures to stay on schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Going Vertical
programme.desc: Chappie Cook's team runs into bears and sinking boats while hauling scaffolding materials. Jeff Erickson carefully begins to construct his slippery roof and Chris Sewell works tirelessly to install all the timber walls of his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Art of Darkness III
programme.desc: Alton delves into the art of chocolate and looks at truffle hearts and fudgesicles,.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fudge Factor
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown helps viewers learn how to grow their own crystals to make candy.

programme.title: Good Eats: Turn on the Dark
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown for an hour- long special revealing the secret power of dark chocolate.

programme.desc: Discover unique versions of the most sought after sweets.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Classic Twists
programme.desc: We discover classics desserts that have been pushed into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zurich
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Zurich, the origin of some of Switzerland's most famous foods. From warm gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate made with a modern twist, this city is home to some of the most indulgent comfort foods in the world.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Must Love Dogs Cake
programme.desc: Eloise Durrant works on an unusual request, a cake that is edible for both humans and dogs.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: An Edible Portrait on a Cake Canvas
programme.desc: Baker Molly Robbins focuses on bringing to life a large cake beach scene complete with jelly sea, crispy marshmallow rocks and dozens of hand-carved sunbathers.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Sea Creatures and Corvette Cakes
programme.desc: Young buccaneers on an Old World pirate ship are treated to a cake filled with treasure, and a group of car connoisseurs enjoys a replica cake that's ready to roll.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Italian Food and Instrument Cakes
programme.desc: A cake to celebrate retiring music teachers is so realistic it looks ready to play a tune, and a family reunion cake is topped off with a barrel of crabs.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: There's no place like home as four cupcake bakers face off for the chance to celebrate the re-release of The Wizard of Oz.

programme.desc: Tesh gives his bike an extreme makeover that isn't as helpful as he hoped. Kit, Tesh and Butch raise money to repair the statue of the original Hughesville Rocketeer statue.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Papa Pluto / Happy Valentine Helpers
programme.desc: Pluto finds a fallen bird's nest with three hatching eggs and becomes the baby birds' protector! It's Valentine's Day and the Happy Helpers roll out their Do-It-Yourself trailer!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Fancy Nancy: Nancy, La Poéte/ Mon Ami ... Grace?
programme.desc: While trying to win a poetry contest, Nancy gets a case of writer's block! When Nancy's Valentine's Day card to Bree is sent to Grace by mistake, Grace thinks they're best friends!

programme.title: Vampirina: Bat Got Your Tongue/ Haunted Theater
programme.desc: Vampirina loses her voice just before a Ghoul Girls performance in Translyania. Vee, Bridget and Poppy meet a friendly, but dramatic ghost on a field trip to a haunted theater.

programme.title: Vampirina: Vee Is for Valentine/ Scarestitute Teacher
programme.desc: Vee tries to celebrate Valentine's Day and Ghoulentine's Day but mixes up her cards! When Mr. Gore needs a substitute teacher, Oxana decides to step in.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Teacher Goes Ninja/ Robot Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Night Ninja kidnaps the kids' teacher; the PJs try to fix a damaged Robot.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Emergency Operator
programme.desc: This 911 dispatcher is used to dealing with stress, but finds 5th grade tough.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An adult's lack of knowledge is tested on subjects they learned in elementary school.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: The Walls Are Closing In!
programme.desc: The Blair family takes on Maze Master Adam Conover's mind-bending games. They must beat challenges like the Shrinking Room to win a chance at up to $25,000.

programme.title: Double Dare: SB #1
programme.desc: Contestants must answer trivia questions and participate in physical challenges.

programme.title: Double Dare: SB #2
programme.desc: Contestants must answer trivia questions and participate in physical challenges.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Portal Jacked! / Warren and Hypno, Sitting in a Tree
programme.desc: Leo must venture to Hidden City to save his brothers; Everyone tries to get something Warren Stone has, but he's not letting it go without a fight, and a side of betrayal.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Purple Jacket/ Pizza Pit
programme.desc: An evil tech club lures Donnie with a purple jacket. And, it's Pizza Week and the Turtles' favourite pizza joint keeps getting taken out.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Smart Lair/Hot Soup: The Game
programme.desc: Donnie's new invention takes over the Lair. Then, Mikey goes on a mission to retrieve a Lou Jitsu video game.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: Spongebob is jellyfishing when he realizes that he wants to fly with the jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Inspongeiac
programme.desc: SpongeBob enlists the help of Patrick to get to sleep, but Patrick can't seem to stay awake.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/ Boating School
programme.desc: Squidward makes Spongebob and Patrick think they're no longer friends; Boating exams.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fast and the Furriest/ Mascot Melee
programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Registered Nurse
programme.desc: A licensed medic is put to the test and it isn't long before he considers using a cheat.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Astronaut
programme.desc: This contestant has travelled to outer space, so he's confident he can land on $100,000. He blasts through the questions, but feels the pressure along the way. He even considers cheating when he gets lost in the 5th grade.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: The Walls Are Closing In!

programme.title: Paradise Run: A Rockin' Run With Thunder
programme.desc: The stars of 'School of Rock' take on the stars of 'The Thundermans' in a Hawaiian triathlon.

programme.title: Paradise Run: Outrigger Run
programme.desc: Teams of two compete for a grand prize tropical vacation and spending money.

programme.title: Double Dare: Thunderstruck vs. Girl Power
programme.desc: With the help of their teammates, Kira Kosarin takes on Olympian Lindsey Vonn. Though they both aim to win, only one team moves on to run the obstacle course.

programme.title: Double Dare: Team Rico vs. Team Raini
programme.desc: It's a family reunion. Rico Rodriquez and his teammate take on Raini Rodriguez and her partner. It's a sibling rivalry until only one wins and moves forward to the obstacle course.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: That's Gonna Leave a Mark

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An adult's lack of knowledge is tested on subjects they learned in elementary school.

programme.desc: A medical practitioner thinks she has enough degrees to ace elementary school, but she only gets to 2nd grade before she considers using a cheat.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!

programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: A young widowed father that has an adolescent son helps him navigate love and discovers he has a lot to learn himself.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.title: Movie: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family prized winery.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rites of Spring
programme.desc: The housemates decide that it is time to diet seriously.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Foreign Exchange
programme.desc: Sophia's friends arrive from Sicily, claiming that their real bambina is Dorothy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: We're Outta Here
programme.desc: A for sale sign was accidentally placed on the front lawn. But, Blanche begins to consider actually selling after seeing how much she's offered.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: We're Outta Here
programme.desc: Blanche debates on whether or not to sell the house as she and the rest of the girls recall times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy is suffering from a mysterious fatigue syndrome that her doctors cannot identify.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a specialist, a Chinese virologist, who may have the key to her illness.

programme.title: Frasier: Room Service
programme.desc: Lilith makes a surprise visit and is distraught that her husband has left her for another man. Frasier fears he is weak to Lilith's beauty and asks Niles to keep him way from her. The next morning, however, Niles and Lilith awaken in bed together.

programme.title: Frasier: Beware of Greeks
programme.desc: The Cranes are reunited with a branch of the family when a cousin is getting married. But first, Frasier must soothe old wounds with Martin's sister-in-law, which incurred after Frasier urged his cousin to study juggling instead of medicine.

programme.title: Frasier: The Perfect Guy
programme.desc: The radio station hires a new health expert, who seems perfect in every way. Frasier tries desperately to find Dr. Clint Webber's flaw, while Martin gets thrown out of the only store that carries Eddie's favourite dog food.

programme.title: Frasier: Bad Dog
programme.desc: Much to Frasier's chagrin, Bulldog becomes a hero during an attempted armed robbery.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Gotta Have It

programme.title: Frasier: First Date
programme.desc: Niles finally takes the initiative to ask Daphne out and Frasier gets hooked on a 'soap.'

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Sublease
programme.desc: The Ricardos have sublet their apartment. But Lucy, deciding they were too hasty, decides to frighten away the new tenant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Business Manager
programme.desc: Ricky hires a business expert to solve the family budget problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Mertz and Kurtz
programme.desc: Lucy goes into service as a maid to help her neighbors, the Mertzes, to impress a guest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Cries Wolf
programme.desc: Lucy cries wolf once too often after testing Ricky's love for her by feigning a crisis.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Anita and Bonnie Pointer from The Pointer Sisters whip up their 1-2-3-4 cake. Sit down with actor Barry Shabaka Henley.

programme.desc: Protecting your identity; the Super Nanny Returns--parenting tips.

programme.title: The Closer: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Brenda receives a tip about a murder-for-hire involving a major drug cartel and solicits Captain Raydor's help. Meanwhile, Brenda's attorney starts deposing the squad about the case at the centre of the civil lawsuit.

programme.title: The Closer: Star Turn
programme.desc: Major Crimes investigates the disappearance of a stage father just as his daughter's new single is about to hit the charts. The Baylor family officers to settle with Brenda in the suit against her but the deal may be too good to be true.

programme.title: The Closer: Fresh Pursuit
programme.desc: While dealing with the stress of not knowing whether or not a judge will drop the charges against her, Brenda and her squad investigate the shooting of a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: 17 Seconds
programme.desc: While Finn gives a health update on Doc, Meredith is assigned to work with Callie for the day. Meanwhile, George gets paired with Derek as Burke and Izzie continue to try to find a new heart for Denny.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Deterioration of the Fight or Flight Response
programme.desc: While Izzie and George attend to Denny as the pressure to find him a new heart increases, Cristina suddenly finds herself in charge of an ER room. Meanwhile, Derek grapples with the realization that the life of a friend is in his desperate hands.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Richard goes into interrogation mode about a patient's terrible condition while Callie confronts George about his growing feelings for her. Meredith and Derek meet about Doc as the search for Denny's new heart comes to a dramatic conclusion.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Colombian Conflict
programme.desc: Charlie, a no-nonsense New Yorker, and Danielle, a nature-loving vegetarian, attempt to survive for 21 days in the deadly Colombian jungle. With polar opposite personalities, will Charlie and Danielle work as a team, or will the jungle tear them apart?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Swarm
programme.desc: An ex-military and a mountain mom take on the jungles of Panama. Disguised as paradise, the harsh environment is teeming with killer bees and other aggressive and disease-carrying insects, one of which may prove to become the team's biggest threat.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Alone: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position in for a better shot. A fire in his shelter could take Ryan out of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Max's Journey
programme.desc: Max adds insights to his experiences as he preps for his biggest challenge yet: twenty-one days alone in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Max Pushed to the Max
programme.desc: Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. Max gets a kill it but it puts his challenge at greater risk, as predators close in to take his hard-earned win.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Arachnid Overload
programme.desc: A survival-savvy yoga teacher and a custom knife maker tackle the brutal jungle of Colombia. Their primitive survival skills are impressive, but the deadly spiders and tics test both their courage and resilience, threatening to take them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Max's Journey
programme.desc: Max adds insights to his experiences as he preps for his biggest challenge yet: twenty-one days alone in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Max Pushed to the Max
programme.desc: Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. Max gets a kill it but it puts his challenge at greater risk, as predators close in to take his hard-earned win.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: To the Moon!
programme.desc: Chad uses a station wagon to create a space-age drag car. The car must be suitable for space travel with wings, in-line seating, and capped off by an 18-inch bubble.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Dirty Hands, Clean Money
programme.desc: The cut rate supercharger Colton brought in threatens to derail to entire build of the custom dragster with bubble top, wings, and inline seating.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Who Made These Rules?
programme.desc: It's the final list race of the season and everyone is aiming to move up. Murder Nova races Farmtruck for the first time and Ryan fights to reclaim the number one spot. Chaos breaks out when Doc refuses a callout.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Doc Amendment
programme.desc: After a difficult end to last season's list racing, the 405 comes together to reassess the rules and make a plan to move forward. They all agree to a list shakeup, which means everyone loses his spot on the list and has to race to earn a new place.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No More Stalling
programme.desc: After an unfinished list shakeup Ryan and Chief finally line up to race off for #1. With the list complete, the 405 gets ready for their first list race of the season.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Deja Vu
programme.desc: It's a mad dash to make repairs as the top racers scramble to get ready to race. Meanwhile, Farmtruck and AZN head out of town to compete in a giant Daily Driver event.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Top Dom
programme.desc: The racers of the 405 struggle to get their cars ready after a tough few weeks of list racing, while Farmtruck and AZN head out of town for an Enduro Race. On race night, broken cars lock up the list and the racers have to come together to keep racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Asphalt Eruption
programme.desc: The top three rush to get their cars ready for race night while Farmtruck and AZN line up against Murder Nova's dad. On race night, tensions boil between Chuck and Shane while racers question each other when callouts aren't made.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Clashes and Crashes
programme.desc: Racers wonder who they can trust as they get ready to race, while the 405 is coming off a tense race night. Farmtruck and AZN find a fish in their callbox that may be more than they'd bargained for, and on race night, everyone’s on edge.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 'Tired' of Chief
programme.desc: After the race against Canada, Dave and Ryan struggle to get their cars switched back to big tires in time for list racing. Monza pulls his car off the list, which lets all the racers below him move up, and Reaper faces an unexpected contender.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Biggest Street Race Ever
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited 8-street racing teams from around the country to Memphis for a chance to win $100,000. A win won't come without a fight, though, as South Carolina's small-tire racers and St. Louis high-dollar drivers are ready for war.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: David meet Goliath

programme.title: The First 48: Birthday Girl
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a 14-year-old girl is killed at her birthday party when gunmen open fire on a crowd. With multiple shooters to track down, the homicide team races against the clock to identify which people at the party were the killers.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood on the Streets
programme.desc: In Miami, the homicide team investigates a triple shooting on a crowded bus that injured two and left a teenager dead.

programme.title: The First 48: The Passenger/ Death Call
programme.desc: When a Tulsa man is gunned down at the wheel of his car, detectives turn to a passenger who saw it all. A 20-year-old man in New Orleans is shot down minutes after his mother gets a warning about the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: A Man's Game
programme.desc: A young man is shot and left to die in the bushes; a mysterious car is the key.

programme.title: The First 48: Unspeakable Part 1

programme.desc: A man is gunned down inside an apartment, setting off a chain of events unlike Tulsa Homicide has ever seen. Later, in a shocking conclusion, Courtney Palmer's disappearance is continued to be investigated.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q host a team building seminar that's definitely not safe for work, and then channel their inner Picassos by posing as caricature artists on the boardwalk.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripteased
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal return to the dentist's office, then try to make each other laugh in a food court tournament. Then, the big loser strips for a rowdy group of ladies who will never be able to un-see the sorry state of his skin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe serve up some mischief at White Castle, take on tourists in Times Square and check out customers in a warehouse store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Boardwalk of Shame
programme.desc: The guys approach strangers with humiliating one liners on the streets of New York, play a unique word game in a grocery store, and try to get shoppers to hop in a trunk at a car dealership.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: The guys tackle speed dating with the world's worst pickup lines, read phoney fortunes on the boardwalk, and get too personal with shoppers in the hygiene aisle of a pharmacy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Stoop Sessions
programme.desc: The guys bring you their favourite moments from season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Stoop Sessions
programme.desc: The guys bring you more of their favourite hilarity from season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The guys mouth off to patients in a dentist's office, toss popcorn at movie goers in a theatre, and take photos for their outrageous blogs in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Art Attack
programme.desc: The guys get touchy feely in a comic book store and become manicurists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Strip High Five
programme.desc: The guys say all the wrong things when conducting sensitivity training, have unexpected celebrity sightings on the street, and are forced into being unreceptive receptionists in a busy office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: The guys share shameful secrets in the park, don headsets at a fast food drive-through, and try to convince unsuspecting strangers to dance with them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Do Something to My Face
programme.desc: The guys enlist shoppers to settle senseless debates in the mall, scream for ice-cream as patrons in a parlour and protest unconventional causes in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside the Vault
programme.desc: The guys meet after the show to talk about their favourite moments during the show, not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. Viewers get a chance to hear all about the behind-the-scenes mishaps.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the Lone Star state in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. The city boys from New York whip up trouble teaching cowboy skills on a ranch, then sell Western wear.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: The guys give a taste of their awkward customer service at a liquor store, take tickets of humiliation at a deli counter and try to get signatures to recognize phony holidays. Tonight’s losers pay a frigid price in a cold-hearted double punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Anniversary Edition
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr celebrate three years of embarrassing each other on this special anniversary edition. The guys reveal some never-before-seen bonus footage of their favorite moments from the vault.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Jokers Playhouse
programme.desc: The guys have to keep a straight face as the other Jokers act out bizarre scenes, and then they try to get an embarrassing word in edgewise with strangers at the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Chopped: Chocolate Competition

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Chocolate Obsession

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Behind the Impossible: A Family Restaurant at War
programme.desc: Robert heads to Columbia, Missouri, to rescue McLanks Family Restaurant from shutting down. The restaurant is run by a single mother and her five adult children who fight constantly, and the tension is tearing apart both the family and the restaurant.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cleaning Up in Mississippi
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine has his work cut out for him when he arrives in Ridgeland, Mississippi. Rossini's Cucina Italiana is filthy, and even worse, owners Lori and Toni seem to have given up. Robert rolls up his sleeves and prepares to get his hands dirty.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Help Is On the Way
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine is in Akron, Ohio, to save Edgar's Restaurant. Fixing a restaurant in only two days is impossible enough but when Glenn, the restaurant's owner, is less than honest, it creates a whole new set of problems.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Opposites Attract

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?
programme.desc: A young woman whose father died when she was a child inherited her family home, but it has been empty for years. She comes to Ben and Erin to see if the house can be saved with her $120,000 budget or if her money is better spent on another property.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Need a Nursery Now
programme.desc: See Mike Holmes and the next generation tackle a time-sensitive renovation for expecting parents. They need to complete the nursery and the only working bathroom in the house before the baby arrives, so Mike and the family steps in to help.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Finishing Favor
programme.desc: See Mike Holmes and the next generation as they help a recently widowed woman complete unfinished projects in her home. Assisting many others, her husband was known as the neighborhood's Good Samaritan, and now the Holmes crew returns the favor.

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House

programme.desc: Budgeting is a must when Mina and Karen splurge on an old house they've had their eyes on for a while. Inspired by its Victorian style, they have big plans for a massive makeover on this 2,100-square-foot home. But this house has plenty of surprises.

programme.title: Good Bones: Saddest Home on Sanders Street
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.title: Good Bones: Little Pink House on Palmer
programme.desc: Mina and Karen buy a tiny duplex to transform into a pink cottage for Mina's sister-in-law in an area in transition. The reveal is an emotional one as the house is, indeed, perfect.

programme.desc: A woman is determined to stop the malevolent spirit stalking her before it destroys her family. Horrific visions of the dead have haunted a man ever since he was a child.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Unreal Estate
programme.desc: A family is excited to rebuild their lives in a picturesque new home until they encounter the malevolent forces within. A couple is powerless to stop a persistent poltergeist determined to tear them apart.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Return to Horror
programme.desc: A woman awakens a powerful evil when she returns to her childhood home. A soldier moves into a new home after completing his tour of duty in Iraq and is thrown right back into battle this time with the paranormal.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Encountering Evil
programme.desc: Strange and scary occurrences make a man question his beliefs while renovating an old mansion. A young woman struggles to free herself from the demonic entity that destroyed her family.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Heirloom of Doom

programme.title: My Horror Story: Night Terrors
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy is thrilled to have his own room in a new home until he meets the demonic entity residing there. A woman wonders if her nightmares are connected to her difficulty conceiving, or a more horrific truth.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns

programme.desc: Porsha is taken by surprise when ex-fiancé Dennis pops up with a ring and unexpected question. Toronto Carnival becomes a circus of intrigue at the final dinner when accusations fly about infidelities and a mysterious lady.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Never Before Scene

programme.title: Below Deck: Man Overboard

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Chicken!
programme.desc: The aftermath of Ashton's accident has the entire crew shaken up, especially Captain Lee. While the deck crew is on edge with a man down, Laura struggles to fall in line with her third stew role and her boss Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Check Yourself!
programme.desc: Adrian is confused by Laura's flirtatious advances after she crashes with Ashton in the crow's nest. Meanwhile, Rhylee gets fired up when Ross tells Tyler he'd be doing him a favour by hooking up with her. Laura and Kate have a screaming match.
