programme.desc: In 1959, nine Russian students died mysteriously while hiking. Explorer Mike Libecki reinvestigates the mystery and finds clues suggesting the cause of the horrific deaths could be the work of a creature thought only to exist in folklore: the Yeti.

programme.title: Monsters of the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of deep sea divers investigate the wreck of German U-boat, rumored to have been attacked by a sea monster during World War 1. Their investigation will take them from the icy depths of the Irish Sea to the inky lair of the Loch Ness Monster.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Ex
programme.desc: A fugitive who was deported several years ago for brutally assaulting his ex-wife has returned to the country and could be looking for her.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Family Secret
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez meets a young woman who alleges that her uncle sexually molested her after a family barbecue.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: American Justice: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: Viewers determine the guilt or innocence of Brian Eftenoff, who is accused of killing his wife.

programme.title: American Justice: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Filmmakers study the effectiveness of law enforcement in apprehending kidnappers.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Triumph & Tragedy
programme.desc: New partners Tommy and Arkady join a desperate search for a victim who went under in the river. Holly and Nick rush a motorcyclist with devastating injuries to the hospital.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When a female professional suddenly vanishes, her family and friends are baffled. Two weeks later, a body is discovered along a highway in another county. It carries subtle clues that could lead Detective Garry McFadden right to the killer's door.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Stalker or Lover?
programme.desc: After a woman's body is discovered in a burning mobile home, Charlotte, NC detective Garry McFadden finds himself with two potential murder suspects, both with solid alibis. He discovers that the flames themselves hold the secret to the killer's identity.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: He's No Angel
programme.desc: Holley Angel was focused on raising her two girls. But even Holley could not ignore the sparks flying between her and a co-worker named Brian. 10 years later, a confession will reveal a betrayal that drags Holley and her family through a living hell.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Carolyn Cox and her husband Billy seemed like a perfect couple. No one in town suspected that she had been hiding decades of abuse at the hands of her husband, but the lies were exposed the day police found Carolyn lying in a pool of her own blood.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Married to a Monster
programme.desc: Judith Mawson escaped a 19 year marriage filled with abuse, drugs, and cheating when she met Gary Ridgway, a 'normal' guy in her eyes. The two had big plans as a couple in the future. Those plans changed when Gary was charged with the murders of 48 women.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Darkness, Deception, DNA
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford had two beautiful children and a charming, doting husband, Dennis. She thought she had a 'happily ever after' ahead of her. However, when Dennis was arrested for a heinous crime all of that changed.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Houston, We Have a Marital Problem
programme.desc: Kaydee Wilson married a man who dreamed of becoming a NASA astronaut, but he committed one of the most outrageous crimes in NASA history.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: The Corpse's Bride
programme.desc: Barbra Reifel was newly married to the handsome, dashing Michael Mastromarino, a young surgeon. But success caught up with him and he eventually spiralled out of control into a vicious cycle of drugs, women and an unimaginable criminal underworld.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Mid-life Murder
programme.desc: Arthur Burney believes it's true love when he runs off with Patricia Meeks, the waitress from his favorite bar. And soon Arthur and Patricia have a daughter of their own. But 16 years later, tensions are stretched to the limit, and someone will snap.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Exquisite Lies
programme.desc: Daryl and Dante Sutorius revel in the luxuries of their exclusive Cincinnati neighbourhood, but the newly married couple has dark secrets that tragically unravel.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Lynn and David Bush are in love, in shape, and in tune with each other's values, views, and goals. So naturally, suspicions of infidelity are met with surprise. There's no smoke without fire - can there be murder without a body?

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love Gone Bankrupt
programme.desc: Gary and Pam Triano's whirlwind romance results in marriage, shady business deals, betrayals and one very bitter custody battle, it leads to a climax that's nothing short of explosive.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: In a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Michael Dally and Sherri Guess are a perfect match. But when Michael takes up with an alluring colleague named Diana in a not-so-secret affair, the fear of divorce will lead the couple down a dark path of jealousy, abuse, conspiracy… And human sacrifice.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in Vegas
programme.desc: John and Evie Watson manage to bridge the gap between their ages, cultures and languages. But after more than a quarter century of marriage-the pillars of their love have crumbled to pieces causing tempers to flare and secrets to be uncovered.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: At Death's Door
programme.desc: Lynn and Manfred Schockner are millionaire executives at an aerospace engineering company. But underneath their privilege and wealth lies a twisted rage that ends in a lethal conspiracy.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Toy Set For Big Kids
programme.desc: Chris gets some much needed help from family to work on his interior. A floatplane with engine problems brings Chappie's build site to a standstill and Jeff makes a critical error while building the water tank system for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Stressful Right Now
programme.desc: Mike and Teresa begin building their walls, but the winch is more dangerous than they realized. Paige and Cody use a boom truck, forcing the team to work extra cautiously. Mike and Kathleen find a nasty surprise at the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient
programme.desc: Jackie's team hears propane leaking somewhere in their cabin as they install the cabinets and stove. Melting trails makes the delivery of cabinets and appliances dangerous at the Owens' build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior of her cabin, while the Owens team is at risk of not finishing their client's cabin on time.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Yurt in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny use a rare wood only found in Hawaii to build a yurt on a farm for clients determined to live completely of the grid.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Anything But Basic
programme.desc: Rachael takes on a builder-basic row home in Philadelphia's East Passyunk neighborhood and intends to flip it fast. Her plan for converting this home into a designer-chic abode includes rebuilding the kitchen peninsula and creating entertaining space.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Namaste Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny Toler meet up with clients Sara and Shawn who want to expand their current home in Haleiwa, Hawaii, to include a multi-functional 16-foot yurt that will serve as a yoga studio and lounge space.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Waterside Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build a Moroccan-style yurt for client Maisa who wants an affordable place that's all her own on her family's waterfront property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Windy Yurt
programme.desc: Ryan and Ali are relocating to a beautiful lot on Hawaii's North Shore that they bought unseen on the internet. They've asked yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to construct a safari-themed yurt.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Home Sweet Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler live in a village of yurts on the North Shore of Oahu but their family is growing, so they're adding on and building a whopping 1,400-square-foot yurt at the far end of their property.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Our First Yurt
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheyenne and Austin are calling on yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler to build their first place, a paniolo-inspired 16-foot yurt with a bedroom, bathroom and outdoor dining space on a piece of family farmland in Waimanalo, Oahu.

programme.title: Love Yurts: The Big Kahuna Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler are headed deep into the jungles of Maui, Hawaii, to build their biggest yurt yet. It's a giant two-story, 30-foot, hydro-powered yurt for their off-the-grid clients Christina and Boe.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Tree Lovin' Yurts
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique, tree-themed yurt. The Beschens decide on a large, 30-foot yurt and request other yurt firsts such as a private, walled-off master bedroom and the largest dormer they've ever built.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Yurt in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny use a rare wood only found in Hawaii to build a yurt on a farm for clients determined to live completely of the grid.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Totally Modular Yurt
programme.desc: A young couple gets creative designing a yurt with modular features. They pull out all the stops to give each piece its own unique design, using everything from beach glass and colored epoxy to a mattress and a turkey carver.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Pop the Top
programme.desc: With their growing family getting bigger by the day, Nathan and Jenny decide it's time to grow their yurt with them. They may have bitten off more than they can chew, however, with only five days to complete their project.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Nathan's Dream Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design the ultimate man cave for a musician and his friend. They go all out, giving the yurt indoor skate ramps, a refurbished pool table and a stage complete with drums and guitars.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers battle to have their creations displayed at a romantic wine tasting.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Stanislaus County Fair/ Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Stanislaus County Fair in Turlock, California. He gets his paws into homemade fries topped with lobster claws and tail meat, and devours a delicious donut ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ohio State Fair/ North Carolina Potato Festival
programme.desc: In Ohio, Noah tries the pulled pork donut and goes fishing in North Carolina for Calabash flounder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Food Paradise: All You Can Meat
programme.desc: These places dish up all the meat you can eat, from a bottomless buffet of skewered meats in NYC to mile-high meaty sandwiches in Colorado.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Chowin' Down the Mississippi River
programme.desc: The best eats along the banks of America's greatest river are highlighted, from jazz-inspired barbecue and mouth-watering meatloaf to seafood-smothered fried green tomatoes and garden-fresh ratatouille.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Cory's Guys
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's husband, Cory, has a lot of single actor friends who rarely get to enjoy a home-cooked meal. Tia's invited them over for a cookout by the pool and she's putting Cory in charge of the grill.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Cree's Birthday Party
programme.desc: It's Tia Mowry's son Cree's fifth birthday and she's invited some of his friends over for a party.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia's Guilty Pleasures Day
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's treating herself to a day of decadence and is indulging in some of her favorite foods. She starts her day with a stop to a popular doughnut shop before heading home to make her own salted caramel swirl ice cream with spiced pecans.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: New Friends
programme.desc: Tia Mowry recently met Catherine McCord and they instantly hit it off. It's not hard to see why; they have a lot of mutual friends and are both busy moms who love to cook.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia & Cory Cook-Off
programme.desc: Tia & Cory to set up a cook-off to settle once and for all who is the master of the kitchen.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia's Perfect Food Day
programme.desc: Tia Mowry takes viewers on a tour through her perfect food day for all three meals.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Springtime Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby prepares a perfect springtime brunch for any family gathering. Inspired by hot cross buns, he makes spiced raisin pancakes and rum raisin cream cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Diner Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay dresses up classic diner dishes like chocolate hazelnut s'more French toast, baked pumpkin oatmeal with a cinnamon crisp and an anything-goes style pasta scramble with breakfast sausage, eggs, kale and tomatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tortillas Again
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown shows his love for leftovers.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I

programme.title: JFK Remembered: 50 Years Later
programme.desc: The astounding 1000 day Presidency of John F. Kennedy was filled with a multitude of dramatic moments, featuring his inaugural speech, the Bay of Pigs, the Cuban Missile crisis through his tragic death by assassination on November 22, 1963.

programme.title: JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald: The Russian Network
programme.desc: CIA veteran Bob Baer shifts his focus to Moscow and delves deeper into the possible connections between Oswald and the Russian government. A former KGB officer provides shocking testimony that shakes up the investigation.

programme.title: JFK's Women: The Scandals Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the dangerous sexual liaisons of U.S. President John F. Kennedy. This explosive bio reveals the President was prepared to risk his political career and his country's security in return for sex.

programme.title: Brad Meltzer's Decoded: Secret Presidential Codes
programme.desc: The team investigates the secret presidential codes of Thomas Jefferson and how they may be partially responsible for the death of one of the world's greatest explorers, Meriwether Lewis.

programme.title: Waco: The Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: William Gazecki chronicles the 1993 standoff between Waco Branch Davidians and the feds.

programme.title: Finding the Mountain of Moses: The Real Mt. Sinai
programme.desc: See new and undeniable archaeological evidence of the real location of Mount Sinai. Plus advanced research based on Christian, Jewish, and Islamic sources indicates Mount Sinai is in Saudi Arabia!

programme.title: American Moses: The Charlton Heston Story
programme.desc: Moses to Michelangelo, civil rights leader to astronaut on Planet of the Apes, Charlton Heston was always more than a Hollywood star. With a career spanning 60 years & a hundred films, he was a cultural warrior & never backed down from controversy.

programme.title: Mad Mel: The Rise and Fall of a Hollywood Icon
programme.desc: Mel Gibson was once considered Hollywood royalty and had the image of a friendly, family man. Now head inside his meltdown to hear the tapes and speak with people who know him.

programme.title: JFK's Women: The Scandals Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the dangerous sexual liaisons of U.S. President John F. Kennedy. This explosive bio reveals the President was prepared to risk his political career and his country's security in return for sex.

programme.title: Satan's Doctor: Felix Kersten
programme.desc: Forcing the Reichsfuhrer to lie to Hitler, Felix Kersten saved thousands from Nazi death camps.

programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Hydra Attacks
programme.desc: SHIELD finds itself caught off-guard and it is left to Spiderman to single-handedly stop the assault.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Hydra Attacks
programme.desc: SHIELD finds itself caught off-guard and it is left to Spiderman to single-handedly stop the assault.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Anti-Venom
programme.desc: Doc Ock and his new assistant, Morbius, create Anti-Venom in order to destroy one of the Web Warriors.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: The New Sinister Six
programme.desc: Spider man faces the culmination of all of Doc Ock's evil machinations when the new Sinister Six assaults the Web Warriors and Shield Academy at the Triskelion.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: The New Sinister Six
programme.desc: When Doc Ock learns that the key to a device that will retrieve Hydra Island is at Aunt May's house, Spider-Man must fight to protect his family.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Adventures in Vampiresitting/ Phlegm Ball
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a human house. Mavis' cousin shows up and challenges her to a game of phlegm ball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout
programme.desc: After crashing Ma Beagle’s birthday party, Webby and a new mysterious friend must get back home.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: The Storm Rages On
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: A storm brews between the Kentucky racers and the drivers from the Northeast. Quinn begins to unravel and JJ intervenes before things get violent.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bald and Barefoot

programme.desc: The Memphis Outlaws finish their race against the Las Vegas racers, but before they can leave town, they get a call from a group of guys in California looking to race. Memphis agrees to stay to race against Cali, but a brawl breaks out before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bald and Barefoot

programme.desc: Tanzanian tricks. Blood on the savannah. Game on.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Yucatan water caves become John's labyrinth of doom.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: The Hunger Game

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Hunted and Haunted
programme.desc: Immediately circled by lions and hyenas, All-star survivalist Lacey Jones is isolated, vulnerable and sleep-deprived as she takes on the African bush. Completely alone, Lacey is pushed to a breaking point where madness awaits on the other side.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hearts of Darkness
programme.desc: Two survivalists continually butt heads in the Cambodian jungle. In the face of extreme heat and crocodile filled waters, their lack of teamwork may be their downfall.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Desperate for a kill on the African savannah, All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position in for a better shot. A fire in his shelter could take Ryan out of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Category Five Survival
programme.desc: A category five hurricane blasts through the camp of Amal, an Iraqi war refugee now living in Iowa and her partner, Duke. In addition to the hurricane, the pair also endures venomous spiders, insects, and nocturnal predators in the swamps of Florida.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Gary of the Jungle
programme.desc: All-star survivalist and wildcard Gary Golding takes on a jungle for the first time completely alone in Belize. Without a partner, Gary forms a bond with a turtle he names Timmy but a deep cut and dangerous infection threaten Gary's challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Queen
programme.desc: In the snake-filled Mississippi swamps, Gabrielle, a former fan survivalist takes on the full 21-day challenge. Gabrielle and Brian are faced with deadly snakes, unrelenting mosquitos, nocturnal predators and a relentless week-long thunderstorm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Max Pushed to the Max
programme.desc: Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. Max gets a kill it but it puts his challenge at greater risk, as predators close in to take his hard-earned win.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Bride, Leave Some Space!
programme.desc: Nikki is looking for a fun, party-ready dress for her wild New Year's Eve wedding. Bride Natalie dreams of a finding a ball gown so massive that wedding guests will struggle to get close to her and someone could even 'hide' underneath it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Watch Party: I Do and I Don't Know

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Tara K.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.desc: Dr. Vincent tries to save a man's enormous toe, as Dr. Schaeffer has his hands full treating a little boy with big demands, and a man with incredibly long toes.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The First 48: Shooting Spree/ Lady in the Fire
programme.desc: In Detroit, Anthony Wright Jr. investigates the death of a man found shot behind an abandoned house. Also, Sergeant Kevin Lundy in Memphis tries to solve the murder of a woman found dead inside a house after a fire.

programme.title: The First 48: Dead Sleep/ Tag Team
programme.desc: Det. Ballman investigates a brutal beating death in the close-knit east end neighbourhood.

programme.title: The First 48: The Girl Who Knew Too Much/ The Guardian
programme.desc: In Dallas, an unidentified girl is found brutally shot in a field, and may have been killed for her silence. Then in Cleveland, a young father is shot in the head trying to break up a fight.

programme.title: The First 48: Killer Connection/ Bloody Birthday
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is shot dead outside a bar, and the killer is caught on video. Then, in Cleveland, a mother of six is gunned down on her birthday, leaving her family devastated.

programme.title: The First 48: The Fallen Angel
programme.desc: A teenager is found naked and shot dead in a park in Atlanta. With no evidence, rookie detective Andre Lowe works twice as hard to discover what happened. The entire Homicide Unit comes together to help identify and recreate the teen's final moments.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: The First 48: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down with an AK-47 in his home, Atlanta detective Kevin Leonpacher discovers the victim's wife holds a dark secret that could tear her family apart.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: The guys illustrate their lack of skill as caricature artists in the mall, demonstrate their odd living habits while interviewing for roommates, and try to cut the line for Broadway tickets in Times Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Who Arted
programme.desc: The guys conduct a focus group with unique consumer questioning, are totally unfit as trainers in a gym class, and pretend to work at a famous New York bakery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sound EffeXXX
programme.desc: The guys debut uninspiring inventions to stunned focus groups, use people for pillows as they fall asleep in the park, and talk shoppers out of their desired products in a grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: The guys search for imaginary places with a little help from strangers, pick their own poison in the park, and there's a surprise behind every door in the horrifying hunt for a house sitter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Psychotic Not-line
programme.desc: The guys endure a shakedown in a discount store, put their fate in the hands of the 'Wheel of Doom' and try to hack it as Hibachi chefs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: The guys face off as optometrists, they break each others’ banks giving bad financial advice, and push outrageous political platforms in a fruitless hunt for votes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Love Expert
programme.desc: The guys lose their rhythm while teaching dance class and try to hock tickets to Broadway.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The guys host a taste test with embarrassing survey questions, haggle over priceless pieces of junk at a flea market, and tank as attendants at a gas station.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: The guys advertise incompetence to a group of agency executives, are forced into dirty deeds as custodians in a mall food court and tempt their fates by returning to the wheel of doom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: The guys bite off more than they can chew serving customers at a sub shop, and they team up at a food court to perform a mystery task based on ambiguous hints from their partner.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Puncture Perfect
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr push all the wrong buttons at a video game store, try to rope rock climbers into repeating a bizarre word, and give away fake tickets to a flop of a show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr feel the wrath of disapproving focus groups after nonsensical presentations, and try to reach out and touch strangers at the mall with anything but their hands. Plus, the guys must quit their job in front of a crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Uncomfortable
programme.desc: The guys talk ticks, tricks and antics. Plus, see the Jokers’ best bloopers and learn all about their annoying habits that aren’t captured on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Clash of the Jokers
programme.desc: In this competitive episode, Sal, Joe, Q and Murr battle head-to-head in fierce joker vs. joker challenges. The guys go two-on-two as they conduct focus groups where they focus mostly on making things uncomfortable.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe share secrets with shoppers in a grocery store, but when one shopper has a history with Murr, the embarrassment escalates to a whole new level. Then, the guys get creative in an art store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Quantum Mock-anics
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal get themselves into some hairy predicaments at the beauty supply store, then, they discover that a language barrier adds to the awkwardness during a text message challenge in Times Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Rebuild and Renew
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte undergo a risky maneuver to salvage 'The Constructor.' Eivin and Eve clear land for a new root cellar, while Jane and Atz Lee seek a new way through the back country by utilizing the furriest member of the family.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Bear Surge
programme.desc: Eivin and Eve brave frigid temperatures as they dive into freezing water in search of nutrients for their garden. On the homestead, Otto and August face a surge of bear activity and Atz Sr. takes advantage of early hunting season.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Cattle in Jeopardy
programme.desc: On the homestead, a game plan is put in place to protect the calves from lurking predators. Eivin and Eve enter dangerous waters to find survivors from a capsized boat and Jane makes a feast for the first-ever Springiving.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Gone Fishin'
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane chase the first salmon run of the season determined to have food for months to come. Otto and Eiven work tirelessly to build safe grazing land for cattle and Charlotte tends to the new bees on the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Protecting the Herd
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte face bear country to reach an ill cow at the head of the bay and on Perl Island, the family continues their quest to expand the grazing land. Later, Otto surprises Charlotte with an unforgettable gift.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Stuck in the Mud
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte get stuck in the mud en route to a prized fishing hole. Atz Sr. and Bonnie attempt a risky salvage mission in the backcountry, and the Kilchers make history with the biggest explosion on the homestead.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Bear in the Honey Hole
programme.desc: Building continues in Browntown but things are advancing slower than all had hoped.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Building Busts

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Australia's Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Queensland's Cape York is considered one of the last wild frontiers in Australia. Steve and Terri set out on a journey along some of the most treacherous roads and remote rivers to reach the northernmost tip of the country.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Mighty Mountain Puppies
programme.desc: Two Bernese mountain dog pups bond with their barnyard neighbours; a trio of Shiba Inu girls challenge their spick-and-span mom with their messy ways; in a litter of mixed breed Chatham Hill retrievers, a pup takes after his boisterous dad.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Feral Shop Cat
programme.desc: Jackson helps a couple whose cats have been fighting to such extremes they moved into a bigger house just to give their warring felines extra space apart. The Cat Daddy works with a feral shop cat named Greenie whose spraying is threatening business.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Pit Bull
programme.desc: When Dr. Jeff examines a beloved Weimaraner who has stopped eating, he makes a surprising discovery. Dr. Baier investigates the cause of a pet rabbit's mysterious fur loss. A servicewoman asks Dr. Jeff for help with her precious pit bull's injured leg.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Emergency Engine Cat
programme.desc: Dr. Ross and vet tech Kyerra rush into action to save a stray cat that's been brutally mangled by a car engine. The Ross' move into their new home while Dr. Blue treats a 700lb arthritic pig. Dr. Lavigne sees a rescue Chihuahua with an incredible story.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Surprise
programme.desc: Rhino Asha is pregnant by partner, Beni. When keepers go home for the night, Asha goes into labour and there's a surprise awaiting them when they arrive at work the next morning.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Day, New Blood
programme.desc: Tia is short-staffed, but finding a parolee who is prepared for the demands of the job is proving difficult. Then, when Tia hears about a pack of pit bulls running in the street, the team races to the rescue and find an overwhelmed owner.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Second Savior
programme.desc: When a sinkhole threatens to swallow a nearby neighborhood, Tia teams up with cat expert Jackson Galaxy to rescue dozens of cats. And, after finding a neglected mama dog near the warehouse, Tia and her team span out to try and find her puppies.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Little Man
programme.desc: A family mistakenly adopts a vertically challenged criminal on the run from the police, not realizing he is a man and not a child.

programme.title: Movie: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover as white women in an effort to protect hotel heiresses, the Wilson Sisters, from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)

programme.desc: NCIS connects a message left in blood by a murdered navy commander to a manuscript that may contain classified military information.

programme.title: NCIS: Two-Faced
programme.desc: To Gibbs' displeasure, Special Agent E.J. Barrett returns to lead the investigation of a seaman's death that may be connected to a series of port-related murders. Meanwhile, Ziva finally introduces her boyfriend to the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Reflection
programme.desc: The NCIS team tracks down a navy lieutenant's killer after a Pentagon security camera reveals a petty officer committing the crime. Meanwhile, Gibbs announces that Agent Barrett and her team will take over the port-to-port serial killer case.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part I
programme.desc: Detective Ambrose investigates a tragic yet suspicious car accident on the outskirts of Dorchester.

programme.title: NCIS: Baltimore
programme.desc: After Tony's ex-partner appears to be the latest victim of the Port-to-Port Killer, he revisits his days as a detective in Baltimore.

programme.title: NCIS: Swan Song
programme.desc: After new evidence reveals that the port-to-port killer has infiltrated the agency, the NCIS team chases every lead in a race to track him down.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Smile
programme.desc: A Park Avenue dentist's murder turns out to be connected to the death of one of his young patients. As detectives look into both deaths, they follow a trail of counterfeit and poisoned mouthwash from the streets of Harlem to the FDA and Wall Street.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Lonelyville
programme.desc: A ménage à trois ends in murder and the only clues the police have to the girl's identity are a pair of emerald earrings.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Depths
programme.desc: The detectives clash with the FBI when they suspect terrorist connections after a diver's body washes up on shore.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss
programme.desc: A wealthy business mogul is sent to prison for insider trading, and upon her release, she's broke, homeless and hated by almost everyone. She turns to her assistant in her time of need in hopes of re-establishing her wealth and changing her ways.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wizard of Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: Homer finally invents something that works and he makes sure that nothing similar exists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Mother
programme.desc: Bart becomes the proud caretaker of a species that could endanger life in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IX
programme.desc: Homer is possessed by a recently executed convict after using his scalp as a toupee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh-in' in the Wind
programme.desc: On a personal quest, Homer digs into his mother's past and discovers his middle name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Gets an A
programme.desc: Lisa cheats on a school test and achieves stardom when she scores exceptionally high.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson in: 'Kidney Trouble'
programme.desc: When Homer refuses to make a rest stop on the way home, Grampa's kidneys burst.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Viva Ned Flanders
programme.desc: Feeling as though life is passing him by, Ned takes a gambling vacation in Sin City.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Wild Barts Can't Be Broken

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Simpson In: Screaming Yellow Honkers

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Kelly: King of the Rats

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Stranded in the Woods
