programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dee Gives Birth
programme.desc: Before Dee's baby arrives, the gang tries to figure out who is the father by throwing a house party for all her former flings.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Gloves Off!: Shell of a Problem

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Little Pol Peep
programme.desc: The doctors deal with an aggressive bovine and a mini horse.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: Hawking and Einstein: Unlocking the Universe
programme.desc: Albert Einstein and Stephen Hawking were revolutionary thinkers who changed everything we know about our universe, and using the latest discoveries, experts explore the connections between these two great minds.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lindbergh Kidnapping
programme.desc: Christof investigates the Lindbergh kidnapping, a story that made his grandfather's journalism career. Now, using his grandfather's notes and recently declassified FBI files, Christof tracks down surprising new leads to Germany and even the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: The SWAT team responds to a dangerous call out: a man has barricaded himself in his apartment and is shooting multiple rounds aimlessly out the window. Trapped on the scene are a number of patrol officers who Rich Emberlin and his squad must rescue.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The End Is Just the Beginning
programme.desc: From gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokémon Go, EMT's see everything on one more busy night before they can celebrate the end of the summer.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Racing the Clock
programme.desc: In Baton Rouge, a brawl erupts in the back of Meghan and Dee's ambulance when an overdose patient wakes up swinging. Meanwhile, Ariel and Cunningham fear the worst as they rush to the scene of a flaming motorcycle wreck in Yonkers.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Curtain Call to Hell
programme.desc: Stephanie and Daniel are young, in love, and happily balancing work and play. But before long, tensions are set off by disappointment, self-loathing, and a mutual affection for the bottle. And by the final curtain call, only one of them is left standing.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Tom and Lynette's love story spans decades from grade school to a posh house with a pool. But dark secrets from the bedroom bleed out onto other aspects of the marriage... and a dangerous obsession rips their romance into pieces.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Knows No Borders
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Donald and Umi fall in love in Indonesia. But as Umi strives to become the perfect American woman in Don's native Kentucky, he longs for something or someone more exotic and when this unorthodox family is divided only one can conquer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: Carli wants to be a cop instead, she marries one. And Jeff takes his role as protector a little more seriously than fun-loving Carli can handle. Her attempts to break free from the confines of wedlock sets off a chain of deadly events.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Honkytonk Killer
programme.desc: Shorty and Cotton seem perfect for each other, they love dancing, motorcycles and each other. But looks can be deceiving, and after a tragic accident reveals a life of lies and deceit, one of them will ultimately dance with the devil to the death.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love and Hot Lead
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls fall head over heels for each other, but when a 49-year-old man decides to come between them, bullets start to fly.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Kiss of Death: Blood Never Lies
programme.desc: Mario is a seasoned EMT when he meets Gina who works in the ER. Sparks fly and soon, the couple are married and living the life of luxury. But, after many years pass, the only way to keep up with the Joneses is bloody murder.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Agent of Death
programme.desc: Vern Holbrook's real estate firm is one of Yakima, Washington's most successful businesses. But this family patriarch has problems: a stepson whose marriage is crumbling, and a business deal that's going sour. Devastating tragedy looms.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: First to Die
programme.desc: A shotgun wedding leaves naval officers John Marmo and Rebecca Braswell in a troubled marriage with a baby. As the relationship crumbles, allegations of infidelity and abuse run rampant. A fierce custody battle pushes both sides in a deadly battle.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Murder in Stereo
programme.desc: When millionaire Werner Hartmann meets Debra Stover he's smitten and soon marries the young beauty. But their romance becomes a roller coaster when a young tennis pro enters the picture. Soon a deadly plan unfolds into a nearly perfect murder.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: To Have and To Kill
programme.desc: After young lovers Deborah and Steven Brown are married, his erratic and malicious side emerges to torment his wife and their kids for the next 16 years. But trying to escape Steven's wrath proves treacherous for Deborah, and those willing to help.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: An illicit affair between a bank executive and his secretary turns deadly when the soon-to-be ex-wife uncovers their romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Locked Up
programme.desc: A single mom looking for a fresh start takes a job as a prison nurse. An encounter with an inmate leads to an illicit love affair. But their relationship is strictly forbidden and when it is discovered the pair take drastic action to stay together.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Vices and Vacations
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths surrounding our favorite vices and learn the facts behind some of our favorite holidays.

programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber

programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build their biggest kitchen yet for a young couple who has chosen a yurt to be their first home. But, their land is on a steep hill and that causes some big design challenges.

programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique yurt on Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Ranch Yurt
programme.desc: Jenny and Nathan head to Waimanalo, Oahu, to build a country-themed yurt on a horse ranch for a couple moving out of their apartment.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Yurt in the Rainforest
programme.desc: A hula instructor and drum maker are looking to build a yurt on their Oahu property. Rain and mud slows the build down, and Nathan and Jenny fight against the clock and the elements to complete the yurt on time.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Nautical Yurt
programme.desc: A couple with a love for the ocean is looking for a yurt, and Nathan and Jenny are up to the task. The build schedule is put at risk, however, when Jenny loses her voice and rain pours in while the yurt goes up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their 90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bathroom Remade
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis saves the original Mid-Century bathroom in her grandparents' house in her classic style; by preserving critical elements while updating tired design choices.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Apartment Refresh
programme.desc: Nicole's grandparents' house sits on a sprawling five-acre parcel and has an apartment. Taking a break from the main house renovation, Nicole tackles the apartment with a series of fun, chic changes that don't cost a fortune.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Hearts of the Home
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles the heart of her Grandparents' home, the living room and dining room. The most 'photographed' rooms in the house, these projects present Nicole with a very clear visual template to work from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bedroom Revival
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles one of her biggest challenges yet. She tackles all of the original bedrooms in the home built by her grandparents. The previous owners trashed the original and design, now it's up to her to fix their mistakes.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reclaiming the Rec Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the basement. With space at a premium, Nicole must battle water, structural problems, dilapidated windows, and poorly placed duct work to turn a neglected area into a much needed gathering space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cubing Around
programme.desc: AB makes good use of the only meat capable of being knitted together.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.desc: Alton embarks on a historical and tasty exploration of tamales, which are quite possibly the original convenience food.

programme.title: Maury: I'm 20 ... Help Me Prove This 49-Year-Old Is My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Rahm and his girlfriend Ariel have doubts that Rahm's the father's of Sabrina's son. 49-year-old Harold and his girlfriend say Harold is not the father of Alexis's son. Jacob says that, due to a military injury, he can't be the father of Jessica's kids.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Won't Be Chained Down
programme.desc: Brittany says her roommate is breaking up her happy home. Brittany has been trying to patch things up with Taye, but fears he may not be able to be faithful.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: A marijuana deliveryman drops his product off to clients in New York City.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Get Over It
programme.desc: After being dumped by his girlfriend, a high school basketball star fights to win her back through any means possible. With the help of his friend's sister, he joins the school musical in an effort to get closer to her.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals
programme.desc: Four university students bored with their quiet suburban lives begin imagining pulling off a heist like they've seen in countless movies, but as their plans to steal rare books from the college's library take shape decide to actually go through with it.

programme.title: Movie: The Odd Couple II
programme.desc: Two mismatched former roommates are reunited when they travel to their children's wedding.

programme.desc: Cedric's hilarious takes on fame, TV, rap, music, sports, diets, plastic surgery and more.

programme.title: Movie: The Mighty Ducks
programme.desc: A self-centered attorney ordered to do community service coaches a peewee hockey team.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Puerto Ricans in Paris
programme.desc: Two Puerto Rican detectives, Luis and Eddie, are sent to Paris to find the stolen handbag designs of a major fashion designer. The hopelessly unhip pair attempt to navigate the city as they deal with high society fashion and its seedy black market.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ick Factor
programme.desc: Monica dates a college boy who thinks she is his age, but she is the one who is surprised.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: What Ever Happened to Baby Peggy?
programme.desc: Peggy makes Molly do chores in exchange for sharing tantalizing stories from her past for Molly's second book.

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver
programme.desc: Christy tries to help Julian, a handsome, newly sober AA member but her attraction to him complicates things. Meanwhile, Bonnie jumps at the chance to attend a lavish charity gala with Jill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smell the Umbrella Stand
programme.desc: Charlie tries to take Alan to Las Vegas in order to distract him from a medical procedure.

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen
programme.desc: Dre must take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school and hatches a plan for them to escape to a fancy hotel for some pampering.

programme.title: Black-ish: First and Last
programme.desc: Diane experiences a big life event toward becoming a woman and Bow, Ruby, Zoey and Alicia are there to support her. Meanwhile, afraid that he may never be able to beat Junior at basketball again, Dre conducts psychological warfare on him.

programme.title: All American: Only Time Will Tell
programme.desc: Billy and Grace worry Spencer will push himself too hard before he's ready. Spencer. Darnell and Jordan go on a college football visit. Teammates and Olivia notice a different in Asher's performance. Layla needs Coop for her future plans.

programme.title: Black Lightning: The Book of Markovia: Chapter Four
programme.desc: Black Lightning and his team descend upon Markovia on a mission to rescue Lynn who finds herself in even more trouble when she meets Gravedigger, a metahuman on the Markovian side.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ride Along
programme.desc: Joey throws himself in front of Ross when he thinks he hears the sound of a gun.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wink
programme.desc: George winks uncontrollably because of some grapefruit juice in his eye.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Peggy's New Beau
programme.desc: Mike becomes tongue-tied when Peggy's new boyfriend asks if he and Molly are planning to get married.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Eat Human Flesh With Wooden Teeth?
programme.desc: A stressed Judith goes to Hawaii, leaving Jake with Alan and Charlie for an entire week.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Darryl Dawkins Dance
programme.desc: As the Sadie Hawkins dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey. But Beverly comes up with a girl that shocks everyone. Meanwhile, Adam gets into a fight with his best friend, Pops.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Why're You Hitting Yourself?
programme.desc: While fighting over the remote control, Adam reaches a defining moment in his relationship with Barry when they accidentally discover a "channel between the channels" that appears on TV. Meanwhile, Beverly grows tired of seeing so many women with Pops.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Lost Baggage
programme.desc: Max tags along with Caroline as she travels to Los Angeles on a film studio's dime to discuss the idea of making her riches-to-rags life story into a movie. While there, Max loses her luggage but finds a new crush.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: In Treatment
programme.desc: Tasha spends an entire day in therapy to get to the root of her relationship issues. Malik makes a brief appearance as the therapist touches on his need to save the women he dates.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Friending Library
programme.desc: The "Meet Outdoor Man" contest winner, Wayne, believes Mike's vlogs contain secret messages. Vanessa wants to make friends, and starts a lending library in her neighbourhood. Chuck adjusts to his new life now that his wife has taken a job in L.A.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Tiffany Haddish, Louie Anderson, Bill Bellamy, Jodi Miller, and Gabriel Iglesias.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Staves v Staves

programme.desc: A holiday party Santa sues for breach of contract; a woman sues her son’s ex-boyfriend over unpaid rent.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Liar Education/ Boat Break Up
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over breach of contract; a dispute over the repairs to a boat.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Gay Crush on My Best Friend
programme.desc: Tank wants to get back with his ex-girlfriend Bri. However she believes they are better off as friends because of his inability to stay faithful. But she also heard a rumor that he might have some sugar in his tank.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man says a woman came to his place of employment and falsely accused him of stealing her debit card information and as a result of her false accusations, he was fired. He’s suing her for defamation of character.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Bad Business Practices', 'Not Splitting The Profits' and 'I Refuse To Pay You.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Parking Madness/ Dancing on My Cake
programme.desc: A woman sues for damage to her car; a bride sues for a damaged wedding cake.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Sisters dispute over a cellphone. Then, a man sues a former neighbour for destroying his prized possession chainsaw. The defendant insists he barely used the equipment and is not liable.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did Not Fracture My Newborn's Skull
programme.desc: Jessica is suspected of giving her newborn child a brain injury, but her sister says she would do no such thing. Then, Hanna is accused of abusing her child by her own mother.

programme.title: Maury: My Wife Cheated With My Best Friend ... Is He My Child's Dad!
programme.desc: Danielle tapped the GPS on her man's phone to see he was at a hotel instead of work. Then, Alvena fears her husband is cheating after he was texted some questionable emojis. Tammy has a secret to tell her husband Randall.
